mapper.select: INSERT INTO daily_intake ( user_id, intake_name, image_url, source_of_intake, calories_value, calories_unit, protein_value, protein_unit, total_carbohydrate_value, total_carbohydrate_unit, total_fat_value, total_fat_unit, dietary_fiber_value, dietary_fiber_unit, total_sugars_value, total_sugars_unit, sodium_value, sodium_unit ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{intakeName}, #{imageUrl}, #{sourceOfIntake}, #{caloriesValue}, #{caloriesUnit}, #{proteinValue}, #{proteinUnit}, #{totalCarbohydrateValue}, #{totalCarbohydrateUnit}, #{totalFatValue}, #{totalFatUnit}, #{dietaryFiberValue}, #{dietaryFiberUnit}, #{totalSugarsValue}, #{totalSugarsUnit}, #{sodiumValue}, #{sodiumUnit} ) RETURNING id

INSERT INTO daily_intake ( user_id, intake_name, image_url, source_of_intake, energy_value, energy_unit, protein_value, protein_unit, total_carbohydrate_value, total_carbohydrate_unit, total_fat_value, total_fat_unit, saturated_fat_value, saturated_fat_unit, trans_fat_value, trans_fat_unit, dietary_fiber_value, dietary_fiber_unit, total_sugars_value, total_sugars_unit, added_sugars_value, added_sugars_unit, sodium_value, sodium_unit, iron_value, iron_unit, calcium_value, calcium_unit, potassium_value, potassium_unit ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{intakeName}, #{imageUrl}, #{sourceOfIntake}, #{energyValue}, #{energyUnit}, #{proteinValue}, #{proteinUnit}, #{totalCarbohydrateValue}, #{totalCarbohydrateUnit}, #{totalFatValue}, #{totalFatUnit}, #{saturatedFatValue}, #{saturatedFatUnit}, #{transFatValue}, #{transFatUnit}, #{dietaryFiberValue}, #{dietaryFiberUnit}, #{totalSugarsValue}, #{totalSugarsUnit}, #{addedSugarsValue}, #{addedSugarsUnit}, #{sodiumValue}, #{sodiumUnit}, #{ironValue}, #{ironUnit}, #{calciumValue}, #{calciumUnit}, #{potassiumValue}, #{potassiumUnit} ) RETURNING id

INSERT INTO food_item ( item_name, calories_value_per_100g, calories_unit, protein_value_per_100g, protein_unit, total_carbohydrate_value_per_100g, total_carbohydrate_unit, total_fat_value_per_100g, total_fat_unit, dietary_fiber_value_per_100g, dietary_fiber_unit, total_sugars_value_per_100g, total_sugars_unit, sodium_value_per_100g, sodium_unit, added_by ) VALUES ( #{itemName}, #{caloriesValuePer100g}, #{caloriesUnit}, #{proteinValuePer100g}, #{proteinUnit}, #{totalCarbohydrateValuePer100g}, #{totalCarbohydrateUnit}, #{totalFatValuePer100g}, #{totalFatUnit}, #{dietaryFiberValuePer100g}, #{dietaryFiberUnit}, #{totalSugarsValuePer100g}, #{totalSugarsUnit}, #{sodiumValuePer100g}, #{sodiumUnit}, #{addedBy} ) RETURNING id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO food_analysis_item ( daily_intake_id, food_item_id, quantity_value, quantity_unit ) VALUES ( #{dailyIntakeId}, #{foodItemId}, #{quantityValue}, #{quantityUnit} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, intake_name, source_of_intake, image_url, calories_value, calories_unit, energy_value, energy_unit, protein_value, protein_unit, cholesterol_value, cholesterol_unit, total_carbohydrate_value, total_carbohydrate_unit, dietary_fiber_value, dietary_fiber_unit, total_sugars_value, total_sugars_unit, added_sugars_value, added_sugars_unit, total_fat_value, total_fat_unit, saturated_fat_value, saturated_fat_unit, trans_fat_value, trans_fat_unit, sodium_value, sodium_unit, calcium_value, calcium_unit, iron_value, iron_unit, potassium_value, potassium_unit, magnesium_value, magnesium_unit, phosphorus_value, phosphorus_unit, zinc_value, zinc_unit, folate_value, folate_unit, vitamin_d_value, vitamin_d_unit, vitamin_a_value, vitamin_a_unit, vitamin_c_value, vitamin_c_unit, vitamin_b6_value, vitamin_b6_unit, vitamin_b12_value, vitamin_b12_unit, vitamin_e_value, vitamin_e_unit, vitamin_k_value, vitamin_k_unit, created_at FROM daily_intake WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND DATE(created_at) = #{date}

SELECT id, user_id, intake_name, source_of_intake, image_url, calories_value, calories_unit, energy_value, energy_unit, protein_value, protein_unit, cholesterol_value, cholesterol_unit, total_carbohydrate_value, total_carbohydrate_unit, dietary_fiber_value, dietary_fiber_unit, total_sugars_value, total_sugars_unit, added_sugars_value, added_sugars_unit, total_fat_value, total_fat_unit, saturated_fat_value, saturated_fat_unit, trans_fat_value, trans_fat_unit, sodium_value, sodium_unit, calcium_value, calcium_unit, iron_value, iron_unit, potassium_value, potassium_unit, magnesium_value, magnesium_unit, phosphorus_value, phosphorus_unit, zinc_value, zinc_unit, folate_value, folate_unit, vitamin_d_value, vitamin_d_unit, vitamin_a_value, vitamin_a_unit, vitamin_c_value, vitamin_c_unit, vitamin_b6_value, vitamin_b6_unit, vitamin_b12_value, vitamin_b12_unit, vitamin_e_value, vitamin_e_unit, vitamin_k_value, vitamin_k_unit, created_at FROM daily_intake WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND id= #{dailyIntakeId}
SELECT fi.*, fai.quantity_value, fai.quantity_unit FROM food_item fi INNER JOIN food_analysis_item fai ON fi.id = fai.food_item_id WHERE fai.daily_intake_id = #{dailyIntakeId};

INSERT INTO product_label ( product_name, category, total_quantity_value, total_quantity_unit, serving_size_value, serving_size_unit, energy_value_per_100g, energy_unit, protein_value_per_100g, protein_unit, total_carbohydrate_value_per_100g, total_carbohydrate_unit, total_fat_value_per_100g, total_fat_unit, saturated_fat_value_per_100g, saturated_fat_unit, trans_fat_value_per_100g, trans_fat_unit, dietary_fiber_value_per_100g, dietary_fiber_unit, total_sugars_value_per_100g, total_sugars_unit, added_sugars_value_per_100g, added_sugars_unit, sodium_value_per_100g, sodium_unit, iron_value_per_100g, iron_unit, potassium_value_per_100g, potassium_unit, calcium_value_per_100g, calcium_unit, added_by ) VALUES ( #{productName}, #{category}, #{totalQuantityValue}, #{totalQuantityUnit}, #{servingSizeValue}, #{servingSizeUnit}, #{energyValuePer100g}, #{energyUnit}, #{proteinValuePer100g}, #{proteinUnit}, #{totalCarbohydrateValuePer100g}, #{totalCarbohydrateUnit}, #{totalFatValuePer100g}, #{totalFatUnit}, #{saturatedFatValuePer100g}, #{saturatedFatUnit}, #{transFatValuePer100g}, #{transFatUnit}, #{dietaryFiberValuePer100g}, #{dietaryFiberUnit}, #{totalSugarsValuePer100g}, #{totalSugarsUnit}, #{addedSugarsValuePer100g}, #{addedSugarsUnit}, #{sodiumValuePer100g}, #{sodiumUnit}, #{ironValuePer100g}, #{ironUnit}, #{potassiumValuePer100g}, #{potassiumUnit}, #{calciumValuePer100g}, #{calciumUnit}, #{addedBy} ) RETURNING id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO food_analysis_product ( daily_intake_id, product_label_id, quantity_value, quantity_unit ) VALUES ( #{dailyIntakeId}, #{productLabelId}, #{quantityValue}, #{quantityUnit} )
INSERT INTO product_concern_recommendation ( concern_id, food, quantity, reasoning ) VALUES ( #{concernId}, #{food}, #{quantity}, #{reasoning} )
